requirements.summary: Fix white screen on load by adding runtime error guards and error boundary
acceptanceCriteria: The app renders its full UI (hero, tool grid, footer) on initial load with no white screen
No uncaught JavaScript errors appear in the browser console on load
CDN library globals (pdfjsLib, jspdf, PDFLib, mammoth) are checked for availability before use in tool components
If a runtime error does occur, an error boundary displays a readable fallback message instead of a blank screen
All 8 tool cards are visible and clickable after load

file_operations.description: Create a React error boundary component that catches unhandled errors in the component tree and displays a fallback UI with error details and a reload button instead of a blank screen
Wrap the entire app content (FloatingParticles, Hero, ToolGrid, Footer, ConversionModal) with the ErrorBoundary component to catch any runtime errors that would otherwise cause a white screen

Add null/undefined guards before accessing window.pdfjsLib to ensure the PDF.js CDN library is available before attempting conversion, and display a user-friendly error message if the library is missing
Add null/undefined guards before accessing window.PDFLib to ensure the pdf-lib CDN library is available before attempting to merge PDFs, and handle the error gracefully with a message to the user
Add null/undefined guards before accessing window.pdfjsLib to ensure the PDF.js CDN library is available before attempting to extract text from PDFs, and provide fallback error handling

Add null/undefined guards before accessing window.mammoth and window.jspdf to ensure both CDN libraries are available before attempting DOCX to PDF conversion, and display appropriate error messages if libraries are missing
Add null/undefined guards before accessing window.jspdf to ensure the jsPDF CDN library is available before attempting to convert images to PDF, and handle missing library errors gracefully

requirements.summary: Audit and fix CDN script loading order and configuration in index.html
acceptanceCriteria: All CDN scripts (PDF.js, jsPDF, pdf-lib, Mammoth.js) load without 404 or network errors
PDF.js workerSrc is set to a matching CDN URL for the same version as the main PDF.js script
The React bundle loads and executes after all CDN scripts are available
No 'is not defined' or 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors related to CDN globals appear in the console

file_operations.description: Audit all CDN script tags to ensure correct loading order: place PDF.js, jsPDF, pdf-lib, and Mammoth.js scripts before the React bundle script tag, verify all CDN URLs are valid and up-to-date, add defer attribute where appropriate to prevent blocking, and ensure PDF.js workerSrc is set immediately after the PDF.js script loads with a matching version URL
